TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Slamaw Itiniay i Heping Cen no Taichung ko Slamaw a niyaro', 148 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 271 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 73% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 199 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 27% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 72 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal69%, Bunun4%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Slamaw Itiniay i Heping Cen no Taichung ko Slamaw a niyaro', 287 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 705 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 47% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 334 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 53% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 371 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal43%, Amis3%, Bunun1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sɾamaw itiniaj i ħəpiŋ ʦən no~u taiʦħo~u~uŋ ko~u sɾamaw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. sɾamaw itiniaj i ħəpiŋ ʦən no~u taiʦħo~u~uŋ ko~u sɾamaw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Slamaw Itiniay i Heping Cen no Taichung ko Slamaw a niyaro', 148 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 271 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 73% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 199 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 27% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 72 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal69%, Bunun4%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Slamaw Itiniay i Heping Cen no Taichung ko Slamaw a niyaro', 287 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 705 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 47% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 334 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 53% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 371 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal43%, Amis3%, Bunun1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sɾamaw itiniaj i ħəpiŋ ʦən no~u taiʦħo~u~uŋ ko~u sɾamaw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. sɾamaw itiniaj i ħəpiŋ ʦən no~u taiʦħo~u~uŋ ko~u sɾamaw a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
